message.content:
@startuml
' Define color scheme
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #666666
    FontColor #000000
}

' Define class styles
class EntityManager {
    [C]
    entities: List<Entity>
    systems: Set<Observer>
    + subscribe(system: Observer)
    + addEntity(entity: Entity)
    + removeEntity(id: Int)
    - notifySystems(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class Observer {
    [I]
    + notify(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class System {
    [C]
    managedTypes: List<ComponentType>
    filteredEntities: List<Entity>
    + addEntityRef(): Unit
    + removeEntityRef(): Unit
    + update(): Unit
    - checkEntityISCompatible(): Unit
}

class Entity {
    [C]
    <<Product Type>>
    ID: Int
    components: Map<ComponentType, Component>
}

class Component {
    [C]
    <<Product Type>>
    type: ComponentType
}

class ComponentType {
    [E]
    DIRECTION,
    POSITION,
    SPEED,
    SPAWN,
    ...
}

' Relationships
EntityManager "1" *-- "0..*" Observer
EntityManager "1" *-- "0..*" Entity
System "1..*" *-- "0..*" ComponentType
System "0..*" o-- "0..*" Entity
Entity "1" *-- "0..*" Component
ComponentType --|> Observer

' Notes
note right of Entity
    Module + Case Class
end note

@enduml
